name: Ambev PO7.5 DMS (bLive) Integration
description:
DMS app from bLive calls SAP PO 7.5 Integration Methods:
» POST     Create Delivery Schedule on SAP
» DELETE Cancel/Erase a Schedule on SAP 1.2.0-oas3 (05/11/2019): Update
    • Method PUT removed since ABAP is controlling creation and updates of schedules, so this method is no longer needed. 1.0.0-oas3 (24/10/2019): Creation
    • Method POST Released
